author: lOrm
content: Extracted resolve_new_refresh_token() helper. On missing refresh_token field in OAuth response: (a) warn! is unconditional, (b) returns Err unless OPENCLAUDIA_ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_REUSE=1 is set, (c) under explicit opt-in still warn!s about reuse intent and the risk if the provider rotates. Added 3 unit tests covering happy path + opt-in policy; tests serialize on the shared env var slot.
